global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on a clear call to action and a prominent message.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their expenses with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: A dark background featuring abstract shapes, including a circle and a rectangle, creating a modern aesthetic.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'EarnPath' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A central area with a light gray background, containing additional shapes and text, emphasizing the main message.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: A collection of geometric shapes in the center, adding visual interest but lacking specific identifiable features.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Track every euro' with a smaller line below it saying 'No hidden fees', prominently displayed.
elements.text_content: Track every euro No hidden fees

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom with the text 'Install now' in a clear, inviting font, encouraging user action.

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: The word 'EarnPath' in a bold font, positioned at the top left, serving as the brand identifier.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with geometric shapes, EarnPath logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: EarnPath, Track every euro, No hidden fees, Install now
